subject: [PATCH 8/9] sched/deadline: defer WARN console output under rq->lock

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch modifies the Linux kernel's deadline scheduling code to defer warning messages under rq->lock. It replaces synchronous WARN*() calls with SCHED_WARN*() variants, which schedule the warnings for execution via irq_work instead of emitting them immediately. This change prevents potential deadlocks that could occur when a legacy or boot console is configured.
